title: The Mightiest Sword
description: A mod that adds the strongest sword and the strongest pickaxe
body:
## Additional Content

New sword item with high attack power and durability implemented
Significantly enhances melee combat, providing an advantage in boss fights and high-difficulty environments
Usable in both Survival and Creative modes

![Attacking with a sword](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/29d8ed6f75c88b340d38527a0effd78f08671c4e.png)
## Purpose

Aims to provide an environment where players can enjoy End content and battles against powerful mobs in a more exhilarating and speedy manner. Ideal for players who find existing equipment lacking or those who want to enjoy combat with overwhelming firepower.

## Features

Thanks to its high durability, it can withstand long exploration sessions and prolonged combat

All versions of this mod except v1.0.0 were created using Mcreator.

# Recipe
![You can craft it using 5 stone pickaxes.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d2e450875aea7f48a2c4715e1db9937dece32d35.png)
![You can craft it using 9 cobblestones.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4b2ab299688b6218ab98681bfe46b36fc1bb216b.png)

You can craft the pickaxe using 5 stone pickaxes.
You can craft the sword using 9 cobblestones.

<Note>

  Even within the same version, features and designs may vary.
Versions marked with a “+” have had their attack power and other stats adjusted.
# Change History
  ### The Mightiest Sword 1.0.3
- Add an area-of-effect attack
### The Mightiest Sword 1.0.2
- Added a new pickaxe
- Adjust attack power
### The Mightiest Sword 1.0.1
- Add texture
